zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia de Holebec於1174年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫時，她的父親Wido de Holebec30歲，母親Mrs. Wido De Holebec27歲。她於1195年與Sir Adam de Musgrave結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Holebec
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Czech and Slovak Bohdan.
Czech and Slovak: derivative of   Holub   ‘dove’.

variants.name: Holub
meanings: Czech, Slovak, Ukrainian, Rusyn, Belorussian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Czech, Slovak, Ukrainian, Rusyn, and Belorussian holub ‘dove’, hence a nickname for a mild-mannered or peace-loving person or a metonymic occupational name for someone who bred or looked after doves, which were reared as egg-layers and for food in the Middle Ages. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. The Russian-oriented transliteration of the Ukrainian and Belorussian surname is Golub .

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia de Holebec was born in 1174, in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Wido de Holebec, was 30 and her mother, Mrs. Wido De Holebec, was 27. She married Sir Adam de Musgrave in 1195. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia de Holebec est née en 1174, à Great Musgrave, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Wido de Holebec, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Wido De Holebec, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Adam de Musgrave en 1195. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia de Holebec 1174 in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wido de Holebec 30 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Wido De Holebec 27. Sie hat 1195 Sir Adam de Musgrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia de Holebecが1174年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドグレアト ムスグラブで生まれた時，父Wido de Holebecは30歳，母Mrs. Wido De Holebecは27歳であった。1195年にSir Adam de Musgraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドで死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia de Holebec(이)가 1174년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 그리트 무스그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wido de Holebec(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Wido De Holebec(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1195년 Sir Adam de Musgrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia de Holebec родилась в 1174 г. в местности грит мусграв, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Wido de Holebec было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Wido De Holebec, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Adam de Musgrave в 1195 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
